items.title: EU/Nordic Morning
items.summary: US-led upside breadth carries into Europe; software/high-beta lead while downside is shallow and concentrated.

alpha: - Breadth and sector mix support maintaining core long exposure rather than defensive rotation.
- Leadership is not only in megacaps: software/media and industrial cyclicals are contributing, which lowers concentration risk.
- Keep macro humility: missing US10Y/DXY/VIX means sentiment read is price-led, not fully cross-confirmed.
beta: - Prioritize continuation watchlist: **ADBE, DUOL, NFLX, TSLA, BA** (current top movers).
- Enter via pullbacks/holds above intraday support; avoid adding at local extension after >3% pops.
- Cap single-name risk where catalyst check is flagged (ADBE, DUOL, NFLX, TSLA) until independently verified.
pulse: Awaiting pulse update.

items.title: US Open +15m
items.summary: Indices opened slightly positive, but dispersion remains high with notable single-name downside in DUOL/MA/RDDT/V.

alpha: - Market tone is not broad risk-on; it is concentrated resilience in index heavyweights.
- Dispersion favors stock selection over directional index aggression.
- Keep strategic size in stable leaders; treat sharp single-name gaps as event-risk until catalysts are verified.
beta: - If S&P/NDQ hold opening range highs, allow small tactical adds in relative-strength names (AAPL, LMT).
- Avoid bottom-fishing DUOL/MA/RDDT/V until at least one higher-low and volume normalization appears.
- Keep tighter stops than usual; today’s tape can rotate fast between “calm index” and “single-name stress.”
pulse: Awaiting pulse update.

items.title: US Pre-close
items.summary: Indices and most single names are green into the final hour, led by ADBE/DUOL/TSLA/BA while gold and BTC lag.

alpha: - Risk appetite improved materially versus open; this supports keeping core long exposure on.
- Leadership breadth is healthier (software, internet, industrial/aero), reducing single-theme fragility.
- Treat late-session strength as valid but monitor for end-of-day fade after sharp intraday recoveries.
beta: - Favor relative-strength continuation setups: ADBE, DUOL, TSLA, BA, NFLX.
- Trim/add only on pullbacks toward intraday support instead of momentum chasing near highs.
- Keep catalyst discipline on flagged movers (ADBE/DUOL/TSLA/BA) before carrying oversized overnight risk.
pulse: Awaiting pulse update.

items.summary: Risk-off tone; biggest movers DUOL, MA.

items.title: US Open +15m
items.summary: Sample historical report for layout preview (2026-02-20 us-open).

alpha: - Keep core quality exposure, avoid concentration spikes.
- Gold/BTC divergence suggests selective defensive behavior.
- Focus on 1–3y themes, not intraday noise.
beta: - Prioritize setups with clear invalidation levels.
- For >2% movers, require catalyst confirmation before entries.
- Smaller size into volatile sessions.
pulse: - Risk regime mostly headline-driven with rotation in mega-cap tech.
- Watch breadth and follow-through before adding risk.
